memberdef.argsstring: (self, std_optional_Vector_std_array_Id_VertTag_2ul_Id_UndirectedEdgeTag edges, VertColors colors, FaceColors faceColors, VertCoords2 uvCoords, VertCoords normals, MeshTexture texture, int_output skippedFaceCount, int_output duplicatedVertexCount, AffineXf3f xf, func_bool_from_float callback, bool telemetrySignal)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim: callback for set progress and stop process
optional load artifact: per-vertex color map
optional output: counter of duplicated vertices (that created for resolve non-manifold geometry)
optional load artifact: per-face color map
optional output: counter of skipped faces during mesh creation
optional output: transform for the loaded mesh to improve precision of vertex coordinates

Generated from: MR::MeshLoadSettings
setting for mesh loading from external format, and locations of optional output data
